query:
SELECT id, username, password, status, planId, createdBy, createdAt
FROM subscribers
WHERE createdBy = 17
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT id, username, password, status, planId, createdBy, createdAt
FROM subscribers
WHERE createdBy = 17
